assertions.name: uses-wrapper
assertions.description: Command uses test_runner_wrapper.sh for YAML status tracking

assertions.name: detects-docker-rule
assertions.description: Detects docker-only-tests rule and uses docker mode

assertions.name: detects-vitest
assertions.description: Auto-detects vitest as the framework from vitest.config.ts

assertions.name: uses-docker-test-sh
assertions.description: Uses scripts/docker-test.sh when it exists (preferred path)

assertions.name: no-direct-npm-test
assertions.description: Does NOT use bare 'npm test' — uses wrapper instead
assertions.check: command.txt does NOT contain standalone 'npm test'
